title: Use machine image as specified in containers.conf
body:
Use machine image as specified in containers.conf
For podman machine init, deprecate the --image-path option for --image.
--image now accepts the correct image from containers.conf

Also, add the ability to specify an OCI image from the --image flag using the docker:// transport.

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

```release-note
The --image flag replaces the now deprecated --image-path flag for podman machine init.
```

Looks like you are missing some files from the PR?
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21778 has merged, but should we document the image is coming from docker://quay.io/podman/machine?
@rhatdan Right now the location of the image isn't set in stone yet, so I'd personally wait to document it.
c/{common,storage} vendor will not pass until https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1848 is merged and updates here, see https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21774
Rebase and this should pass now.
@ashley-cui Looks like this needs yet another rebase
